title: Service Manager (LSA/FFE)
description:
• Lead, plan, and coordinate the deployment and scheduling of LSA / FFE service teams across multiple job sites to ensure optimal manpower utilization.

• Provide technical direction and oversight for the servicing of fire-fighting systems, life-saving appliances, lifeboats, and related equipment.

• Ensure service jobs are completed safely, accurately, and on time in compliance with SOPs, safety standards, and class or regulatory requirements.

• Monitor productivity, workflow efficiency, manpower usage, and overtime costs to maintain operational effectiveness.

• Coach, mentor, and develop technicians to drive high standards of performance, competence, and safety culture.

• Oversee end-to-end service execution to deliver consistent and high levels of customer satisfaction.

• Act as a key point of contact for service enquiries, technical clarifications, and issue resolution with customers.

• Work closely with Sales and Order Processing teams to support smooth planning, coordination, and execution of service jobs.

• Review, verify, and approve service reports, technical documentation, and job closures for accuracy and completeness.

• Drive departmental KPIs, budget performance, and P&L results in line with business objectives.

• Review and optimize pricing strategies and service cost structures to improve margins and overall profitability.

• Identify and implement cost-efficiency initiatives while maintaining service quality, safety, and compliance standards.

• Support service-related business development activities when required.

• Implement, review, and continuously improve service processes, workflows, and SOPs.

• Ensure full compliance with safety regulations, class rules, and statutory requirements across all service activities.

• Review and approve risk assessments and safe work procedures prior to job execution.

• Ensure tools, equipment, and testing instruments are properly maintained, calibrated, and ready for use.

• Review monthly operational, manpower, and performance reports to track trends and areas for improvement.

• Manage vendors, subcontractors, and spare parts sourcing to support timely and effective service delivery.

postedCompany.description:
At Direct Search Asia we deliver innovative and flexible recruitment solutions for partners primarily within the shipping, marine & offshore, oil & gas and logistics sectors. We treat businesses and individuals equally - sharing information, challenging assumptions, maintaining open communications and operating with integrity.

Wherever you plan for your career or business to be, we have a plan to help get you there.

Visit us at www.directsearchasia.com/vacancies and follow us on LinkedIn for more information and opportunities
